standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: فهم اللغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة والتفاعل معها في مواضيع أساسية بسيطة متنوعة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Understand and interact with spoken English on a variety of simple basic topics
indicators: Recognize and respond to simple greetings (Hello! Goodbye! How are you today?)
Recognize basic classroom instructions (Open your book! Look at me!)
Identify cardinal numbers (1-10)
Listen to and recite simple nursery rhymes
Respond with gestures to yes/no and wh-simple questions

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار التعرف على الكلمات الإنجليزية البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate recognition of simple English words
indicators: Associate basic words with their pictures
Listen to and identify simple words naming classroom objects, colors, shapes, animals, food, body parts and days of the week

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير التعرف على نطق الحروف المختلفة للأبجدية الإنجليزية والكلمات
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop recognition of the pronunciation of the different letters of the English alphabet and words
indicators: Correctly pronounce the English sounds and morphologically simple words
Distinguish often confused sounds (/b/ and /p/) with teacher guidance.
Use single words, cardinal numbers and simple formulaic utterances.
Recite rhymes and songs, individually and in groups, to enhance correct pronunciation

standards.nameAr: إنتاج كلمات أساسية وعبارات تواصلية بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Produce basic words and simple communicative utterances

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار القدرة على إنتاج كلمات مفردة وعبارات بسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate the ability to produce single words and simple utterances
indicators: Use utterances with to be + adjectives and to have with guidance (e.g., I have one brother. She is tall.)
Ask and answer simple yes/no questions with guidance using the vocabulary introduced

standards.nameAr: فهم اللغة الإنجليزية المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة واستخدام الموسيقى والأغاني والحركة للمساعدة في الفهم
standards.nameEn: Comprehend written English in basic and simple guided contexts and using music, songs and movement to aid comprehension

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات ما قبل القراءة (إمساك الكتاب بشكل صحيح، تمييز الحروف والكلمات والمسافات، تخمين القصة من الصور)
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop pre-reading strategies (holding a book correctly, distinguishing letters, words and spaces, guessing a story from pictures)
indicators: Establish left-to-right, top-to-bottom direction of reading
Distinguish between spaces, letters and words
Identify sound-letter correspondence
Use pictures and other visual cues to better understand simple written material
Answer simple questions on the reading text

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير التعرف على حروف الأبجدية الإنجليزية ومقابلاتها الصوتية وتركيباتها في الكلمات الأساسية
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop recognition of the letters of the English alphabet, their phonic counterpart(s) and their combinations in basic words
indicators: Identify the letters of the English alphabet by their names, sounds and shapes
Distinguish between small and capital letters
Decode phonetically non-phonemic sounds (e.g., enough, tough)
Learn alphabet rhymes and songs with visual aids and actions
Identify simple familiar sight words with correct pronunciation and relate them to familiar objects from the environment
Read minimal sets/word families (e.g., hat, rat, cat)

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to written English in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Recognize one's own name
Match simple words with pictures
Match words that begin or end with the same letter or sound
Distinguish reading-related vocabulary (book, page, line, word, title, next, turn over)
Demonstrate understanding of words through participation in games (I Spy, Bingo)
Classify, match and order key words from simple, short texts

standards.nameEn: Write in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Properly hold pencils and crayons
Demonstrate awareness of text direction
Trace letters and numbers on the board or on a paper

learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Begin to write the alphabet and simple words
indicators: Write the letters of the alphabet, both capital and small
Copy simple words
Fill in missing letters to complete words

standards.nameAr: التعرف على النصوص المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة واستخدام الموسيقى والأغاني والحركة للمساعدة في الفهم
standards.nameEn: Recognize visual texts in basic and simple guided contexts and using music, songs and movement to aid comprehension

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: فهم أن العالم من حوله مليء باللغة المرئية التي تنقل معنى
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Understand that the world around him/her is full of visual language that conveys meaning
indicators: Realize that colors, shapes, symbols and images in visual texts have meaning
Begin to notice and understand signs and labels in school and familiar places
Observe visual cues that indicate context

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to visual English in basic and simple guided contexts

indicators: Begin to talk about his/her own feelings in response to visual presentations (by showing amusement, curiosity or surprise)
Attend to visual information showing understanding through play, gestures and facial expressions
Use body language to communicate ideas (pointing, gesturing, facial expressions)
Use single words and two-word phrases in context
